ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep disorder the subject has */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "family_sleep_history" TEXT /* Family sleep history of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_subject_type FOREIGN KEY ("subject_type") REFERENCES disorders ("disorder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep study */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject undergoing the sleep study */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of sleep in the study */,
  "nrem_time" REAL /* Total Non-Rapid Eye Movement (NREM) sleep time */,
  "cap_time" REAL /* Total Catalepsy time */,
  "cap_rate" REAL /* Catalepsy rate */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the sleep study was conducted */,
  "study_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sleep study */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sleep study data (e.g., good, poor, moderate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sleep study record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sleep study record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_studies_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disorders" (
  "disorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep disorder */,
  "disorder_name" TEXT /* Name of the sleep disorder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sleep disorder */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the sleep disorder */,
  "diagnosis_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for diagnosing the sleep disorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disorder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies_researchers" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the study */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study (e.g., principal investigator, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep study the result belongs to */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Finding from the sleep study */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the finding */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the study results */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps for the subject or further research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES sleep_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES sleep_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep study */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES sleep_studies ("study_id")
)
